revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:十郎横穴墓群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:十郎横穴墓群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:十郎横穴墓群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:十郎横穴墓群]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|35.9745|N|139.351|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}
'''Jurō Rock-cut Tomb Group''' (十郎横穴墓群) is a collection of [[:en:Corridor-type kofun|Corridor-type kofun]] from the late [[Kofun period]] located in [[Ishizaka, Hatoyama Town, Hiki District, Saitama Prefecture]].
== Overview == The tombs are carved into the steep tuffaceous sandstone slopes descending southward from the {{ill|Iwabito Hills|ja|岩殿丘陵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwabito Hills|1=Iwadono Hills|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11475237}}, facing the {{ill|Hatogawa River (Saitama Prefecture)|ja|鳩川 (埼玉県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hatogawa River (Saitama Prefecture)|1=Hato River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q97311318}}. Currently, three tombs are open, but a 1990 field survey suggested that many more remain buried<ref name="annaiban">Information Board at the Site (Hatoyama Town Board of Education, March 1992), confirmed on September 17, 2013.</ref>.
The site is designated as a {{ill|Saitama Prefecture Selected Important Archaeological Site|ja|埼玉県選定重要遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefecture Selected Important Archaeological Site|1=Important Cultural Properties of Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q117830994}} and a town-designated historic site<ref>{{PDFlink|[http://www.pref.saitama.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/555321.pdf Saitama Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties]}} - Saitama Prefecture</ref>.
== References == {{Reflist}}
== See Also == * {{ill|List of Saitama Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties (Selected Important Archaeological Sites)|ja|埼玉県指定文化財一覧#県選定重要遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Saitama Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties (Selected Important Archaeological Sites)|1=Q11426571|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11426571}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=list of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11426533}} * {{ill|Rock-cut tomb|ja|横穴墓|1=Yokoanabo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rock-cut tomb|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoanabo|qq=}}
== External Links == * [http://www.hiki-saitama.jp/kankou/guide/history/24.htm Jurō Rock-cut Tomb Group] - Hiki Regional Promotion Committee (Hiki Tourism Guide)
{{Coord|35|58|28.2|N|139|21|3.6|E|region:JP|display=title}}
{{Japanese-history-stub}} {{japan-geo-stub}}
== Distribution and Notable Yokoanabo Tombstama) - Over 30 tombs == * {{ill|Jūrō Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūrō Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Hatoyama, Saitama|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hatoyama, Saitama|qq=}}, Saitama) - 3 tombs * {{ill|Takinojō Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takinojō Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Tokorozawa|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokorozawa|qq=}}, Saitama) - 9 tombs * {{ill|Kitaakitsu Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitaakitsu Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} (Tokorozawa, Saitama) - 8 tombs * {{ill|Bikuniyama Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bikuniyama Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Higashimatsuyama|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higashimatsuyama|qq=}}, Saitama) - Over 50 tombs * {{ill|Takane Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takane Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Kumagaya|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumagaya|qq=}}, Saitama) - Municipal Historic Site * {{ill|Nagara Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagara Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Nagara, Chiba|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagara, Chiba|qq=}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|qid=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture|1=Chiba Prefecture}}) - National Historic Site, over 300 tombs * {{ill|Deyama Graves|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Deyama Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Mitaka, Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitaka, Tokyo|qq=}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}) - Metropolitan Historic Site, 10 tombs * {{ill|Nakawada Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakawada Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Tama, Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tama, Tokyo|qq=}}, Tokyo) - 14 tombs * {{ill|Todoroki Ravine Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todoroki Ravine Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Setagaya|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setagaya|qq=}}, Tokyo) * {{ill|Ekoda Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ekoda Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Aoba-ku, Yokohama|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aoba-ku, Yokohama|qq=}}, {{ill|Yokohama|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama|qq=}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}) - Municipal Historic Site, 2 tombs * {{ill|Ichigao Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichigao Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} (Aoba-ku, Yokohama) - Prefectural Historic Site, 19 tombs * {{ill|Itachigawa Basin Rock-Cut Tombs|ja|㹨川流域横穴墓群|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itachigawa Basin Rock-Cut Tombs|qq=}} (Kamakura-style tomb concentration) ** {{ill|Matsugasaki Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsugasaki Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Kōnan-ku, Yokohama|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōnan-ku, Yokohama|qq=}}, Yokohama) - Municipal Historic Site, 8 tombs ** {{ill|Shichisekiyama Yokoanabo Cluster|ja|七石山横穴墓群|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichisekiyama Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Sakae-ku, Yokohama|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakae-ku, Yokohama|qq=}}, Yokohama) - Over 100 tombs originally ** {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|qq=}} (Sakae-ku, Yokohama) - 23 tombs ** {{ill|Hikoshigaya Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikoshigaya Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} (Sakae-ku, Yokohama) - 12 tombs
=== Tokai Region === * {{ill|Kashiya Yokoanabos|en|Kashiya Yokoanabos|qid=Q22118267|lt=Kashiya Yokoanabos|1=Kashiya Yokoanabos}} ({{ill|Kannami|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannami|qq=}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|qid=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}) - National Historic Site, 106 tombs * {{ill|Kitaema Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitaema Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Izunokuni|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izunokuni|qq=}}, Shizuoka) - National Historic Site, 101 tombs * {{ill|E-no-ura Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/E-no-ura Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Numazu|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Numazu|qq=}}, Shizuoka) - Prefectural Historic Site, 92 tombs
=== Hokuriku Region === * {{ill|Hōōzan Yokoanabos|en|Hōōzan Yokoanabos|qid=Q18339249|lt=Hōōzan Yokoanabos|1=Hōōzan Cave Tombs}} ({{ill|Kaga, Ishikawa|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga, Ishikawa|qq=}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|en|Ishikawa Prefecture|qid=Q131281|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}}) - National Historic Site, over 150 tombs
=== Kinki Region === * {{ill|Takaida Yokoanabos|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takaida Yokoanabos|qq=}} ({{ill|Kashiwara, Osaka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kashiwara, Osaka|qq=}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}) - National Historic Site, over 200 tombs * {{ill|Anfuku-ji (Kashiwara)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anfukuji Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} (Kashiwara, Osaka) - 32 tombs
=== Chūgoku Region === * {{ill|Jūōmen Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūōmen Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Matsue|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsue|qq=}}, {{ill|Shimane Prefecture|en|Shimane Prefecture|qid=Q132751|lt=Shimane Prefecture|1=Shimane Prefecture}}) - 37 tombs * {{ill|Kitsunedani Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunedani Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} (Matsue, Shimane) - 16 tombs * {{ill|Kamikonishi Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikonishi Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Izumo, Shimane|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izumo, Shimane|qq=}}, Shimane) * {{ill|Takatsuku Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takatsuku Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Chibu, Shimane|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chibu, Shimane|qq=}}, [[:en:Oki District|Oki District]])
=== Kyushu Region === * {{ill|Takenami Site|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takenami Site|qq=}} ({{ill|Yukuhashi|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukuhashi|qq=}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|qid=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}}) - Over 1,000 tombs * {{ill|Shiroyama Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiroyama Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Fukuchi, Fukuoka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukuchi, Fukuoka|qq=}}, Fukuoka) - National Historic Site, over 200 tombs * {{ill|Mizumachi Site|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizumachi Site|qq=}} ({{ill|Nōgata|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōgata|qq=}}, Fukuoka) - Prefectural Historic Site, over 40 tombs * {{ill|Kozuki Yokoanabo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kozuki Yokoanabo|qq=}} ({{ill|Kurate, Fukuoka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurate, Fukuoka|qq=}}, Fukuoka) - National Historic Site * {{ill|Ishinuki Nagino Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishinuki Nagino Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Tamana|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamana|qq=}}, {{ill|Kumamoto Prefecture|en|Kumamoto Prefecture|qid=Q130308|lt=Kumamoto Prefecture|1=Kumamoto Prefecture}}) - National Historic Site * {{ill|Ishinuki Anakanon Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishinuki Anakanon Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} (Tamana, Kumamoto) - National Historic Site * {{ill|Nabeta Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nabeta Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Yamaga, Kumamoto|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamaga, Kumamoto|qq=}}, Kumamoto) - National Historic Site, 60 tombs * {{ill|Ōmura Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmura Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Hitoyoshi|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hitoyoshi|qq=}}, Kumamoto) - National Historic Site, 27 tombs * {{ill|Yokkaichi Yokoanabo Cluster|en|Yokkaichi Yokoanabo Cluster|qid=Q11419962|lt=Yokkaichi Yokoanabo Cluster|1=Yokkaichi Yokoanabo Cluster}} ({{ill|Usa (宇佐)|lt=Usa (宇佐)|lt=Usa|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Usa|qq=}}, {{ill|Ōita Prefecture|en|Ōita Prefecture|qid=Q133924|lt=Ōita Prefecture|1=Ōita Prefecture}}) - National Historic Site, 161 tombs * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Yokoanabo Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Yokoanabo Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic Site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, {{ill|Miyazaki Prefecture|en|Miyazaki Prefecture|qid=Q130300|lt=Miyazaki Prefecture|1=Miyazaki Prefecture}}) - National Historic Site
== Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]]
== References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). Iwanami Japanese History Dictionary. Iwanami Shoten. * Yokohama History Foundation (2013). History of Yokoanabos.
*
